name: Sanchez v. Mayorkas
question: Does the conferral of Temporary Protected Status under 8 U.S.C. § 1254a constitute an “admission” into the United States under 8 U.S.C. § 1255?
description: A case in which the Court held that under 8 U.S.C. § 1254a(f)(4), a grant of temporary protected status does not constitute an “admission” into the United States and thus does not authorize eligible noncitizens to obtain lawful-permanent-resident status under 8 U.S.C. § 1255.
